product: Genie knowledge store and metadata improvements
tagline: Benchmark execution bug fix in Genie: A bug where benchmarks would not execute immediately after creating a benchmark run has been fixed.
what_it_does: Benchmark execution bug fix in Genie: A bug where benchmarks would not execute immediately after creating a benchmark run has been fixed. Popular query suggestions in Genie: Genie will now suggest popular queries as example SQL for newly added tables to the space. Only popular queries that the author has access to are suggested.
why_it_matters: Table metadata improvement in Genie: The process to provide table metadata to Genie has been changed to simplify data transformation for Genie workloads.
